tasks.title: [ECOM-053] Enhanced Cart Context with Firebase Sync
tasks.body:
Implement CartContext with dual storage (localStorage for guests + Firebase Firestore for authenticated users). Includes automatic cart sync when users sign in, real-time updates across devices, and complete cart management (add, update, remove, clear).

Implement CartContext with dual storage (localStorage for guests + Firebase Firestore for authenticated users). Includes automatic cart sync when users sign in, real-time updates across devices, and complete cart management (add, update, remove, clear).

## Deliverables

- [x] `src/contexts/CartContext.tsx` - Main context provider
- [x] `src/lib/firebase/cart.ts` - Firebase cart service
- [x] Cart sync on sign-in functionality
- [x] Real-time cart updates across devices
- [x] Cart version 2 format with timestamps
- [x] Unit tests for cart operations

## Acceptance Criteria

- [x] Cart persists in localStorage for guest users
- [x] Cart syncs to Firebase when user logs in
- [x] Cart updates in real-time across multiple tabs/devices
- [x] Add to cart shows success toast notification
- [x] Quantity updates reflect immediately in UI
- [x] Remove from cart updates both storage locations
- [x] Cart migrates from v1 to v2 format automatically

## Scoring Criteria

| Criterion | Points | Weigh

tasks.title: [ECOM-054] Add-to-Cart Integration Across Pages
tasks.body:
Integrate add-to-cart functionality across all product display pages (shop, product detail, category pages). Includes quantity selector, stock validation, and success feedback with toast notifications.

Integrate add-to-cart functionality across all product display pages (shop, product detail, category pages). Includes quantity selector, stock validation, and success feedback with toast notifications.

## Deliverables

- [x] Shop page add-to-cart buttons
- [x] Product detail page quantity selector
- [x] Category page quick-add functionality
- [x] Stock validation before adding
- [x] Toast notifications for success/error
- [x] Loading states during add operation
- [x] Cart icon badge count update

## Acceptance Criteria

- [x] Add to cart works from all product pages
- [x] Quantity selector validates against stock
- [x] Out-of-stock products show disabled button
- [x] Success toast shows product name
- [x] Cart badge updates immediately
- [x] Prevent duplicate cart operations

## Scoring Criteria

| Criterion | Points | Weight |
|-----------|--------|--------|
| Functionality | 5/5 | 50% |
| UX/UI | 4/5 | 30% |
| Error Handling | 4/5 | 20% |

---

**Task ID:** ECOM-054
**Story Points:*

tasks.title: [ECOM-055] Cart Dropdown Component
tasks.body:
Build interactive cart dropdown in header with product images, quantities, prices, and quick actions (remove, update quantity, checkout). Includes empty state and cart summary.

Build interactive cart dropdown in header with product images, quantities, prices, and quick actions (remove, update quantity, checkout). Includes empty state and cart summary.

## Deliverables

- [x] Cart dropdown UI component
- [x] Product image display
- [x] Quantity increment/decrement
- [x] Remove item functionality
- [x] Cart total calculation
- [x] Checkout button with navigation
- [x] Empty cart state with CTA
- [x] Responsive design (mobile/desktop)

## Acceptance Criteria

- [x] Dropdown opens on cart icon click
- [x] Shows all cart items with images
- [x] Quantity controls work without page refresh
- [x] Remove button updates cart immediately
- [x] Total price updates in real-time
- [x] Checkout button navigates to /checkout
- [x] Empty state shows "Continue Shopping" button

## Scoring Criteria

| Criterion | Points | Weight |
|-----------|--------|--------|
| UI Design | 5/5 | 30% |
| Functionality | 5/5 | 40% |
| Responsiveness | 4/5 | 20% |
| Performance | 4/5 | 10% |

-

tasks.title: [ECOM-056] 3-Step Checkout Form Implementation
tasks.body:
Create comprehensive 3-step checkout flow: (1) Delivery Address with Google Maps picker and Lalamove quotes, (2) Contact Information with form validation, (3) Payment Method with PayMongo integration. Includes form state management, validation, and order summary sidebar.

Create comprehensive 3-step checkout flow: (1) Delivery Address with Google Maps picker and Lalamove quotes, (2) Contact Information with form validation, (3) Payment Method with PayMongo integration. Includes form state management, validation, and order summary sidebar.

## Deliverables

- [x] `/checkout` page with 3-step wizard
- [x] Google Maps address picker component
- [x] Lalamove quote integration
- [x] Payment method selector
- [x] Form validation with Zod schemas
- [x] Order summary sidebar
- [x] Mobile-responsive design
- [x] Progress indicator (Steps 1/3, 2/3, 3/3)
- [x] Save address functionality
- [x] Auto-fill for logged-in users

## Acceptance Criteria

- [x] Step navigation works forward/backward
- [x] Form validation prevents invalid submissions
- [x] Google Maps address autocomplete functional
- [x] Lalamove quotes display real-time pricing
- [x] Payment methods redirect to PayMongo
- [x] Order summary shows correct totals
- [x] Saved addresses load from Firebase
- [x

tasks.title: [ECOM-057] Firebase Order Creation Service
tasks.body:
Implement Firebase Firestore service for creating and managing orders. Includes order document creation, status workflow, notifications creation, and cart cleanup after successful order submission.

Implement Firebase Firestore service for creating and managing orders. Includes order document creation, status workflow, notifications creation, and cart cleanup after successful order submission.

## Deliverables

- [x] `src/lib/firebase/orders.ts` - Order service
- [x] Order creation function with validation
- [x] Order status workflow (pending_approval, approved, preparing, etc.)
- [x] Automatic notification creation
- [x] Cart cleanup after order
- [x] Order retrieval functions
- [x] Order update functions

## Acceptance Criteria

- [x] Orders saved to Firestore successfully
- [x] Order ID generated automatically
- [x] Notification created on order submission
- [x] Cart cleared after order creation
- [x] Order status defaults to 'pending_approval'
- [x] All order data properly structured

## Scoring Criteria

| Criterion | Points | Weight |
|-----------|--------|--------|
| Code Quality | 5/5 | 30% |
| Data Structure | 5/5 | 30% |
| Error Handling | 4/5 | 20% |
| Testing | 4/5 | 2

tasks.title: [ECOM-053] Enhanced Cart Context with Firebase Sync
tasks.body:
Implement CartContext with dual storage (localStorage for guests + Firebase Firestore for authenticated users). Includes automatic cart sync when users sign in, real-time updates across devices, and complete cart management (add, update, remove, clear).

Priority: Medium
Story Points: 0
Status: Completed

tasks.title: [ECOM-054] Add-to-Cart Integration Across Pages
tasks.body:
Integrate add-to-cart functionality across all product display pages (shop, product detail, category pages). Includes quantity selector, stock validation, and success feedback with toast notifications.

Priority: Medium
Story Points: 0
Status: Completed

tasks.title: [ECOM-055] Cart Dropdown Component
tasks.body:
Build interactive cart dropdown in header with product images, quantities, prices, and quick actions (remove, update quantity, checkout). Includes empty state and cart summary.

Priority: Medium
Story Points: 0
Status: Completed

tasks.title: [ECOM-056] 3-Step Checkout Form Implementation
tasks.body:
Create comprehensive 3-step checkout flow: (1) Delivery Address with Google Maps picker and Lalamove quotes, (2) Contact Information with form validation, (3) Payment Method with PayMongo integration. Includes form state management, validation, and order summary sidebar.

Priority: Medium
Story Points: 0
Status: Completed

tasks.title: [ECOM-057] Firebase Order Creation Service
tasks.body:
Implement Firebase Firestore service for creating and managing orders. Includes order document creation, status workflow, notifications creation, and cart cleanup after successful order submission.

Priority: Medium
Story Points: 0
Status: Completed

tasks.title: [ECOM-058] Order Success Modal and Confirmation
tasks.body:
Create order success modal with order ID, summary, next steps, and navigation buttons. Includes confetti animation and email confirmation notice.

Priority: Medium
Story Points: 0
Status: Completed

tasks.title: [ECOM-059] Admin Order Dashboard
tasks.body:
Build comprehensive admin dashboard for viewing all orders, filtering by status, approving/rejecting orders, and managing order workflow. Includes real-time order updates and automatic Lalamove delivery creation on approval.

Priority: Medium
Story Points: 0
Status: Completed

tasks.title: [ECOM-060] Delivery Tracking Page with Lalamove
tasks.body:
Implement delivery tracking page showing Lalamove driver information, real-time location updates, estimated arrival time, and delivery status. Includes Google Maps integration for route visualization.

Priority: Medium
Story Points: 0
Status: Completed

tasks.title: [ECOM-061] Real-Time Notifications System
tasks.body:
Create real-time notifications system using Firebase Firestore for instant updates on order status changes. Includes bell icon dropdown, notification count badge, mark as read functionality, and notification types (order created, approved, rejected, delivery updates).

Priority: Medium
Story Points: 0
Status: Completed

tasks.title: [ECOM-062] User Profile and Address Management
tasks.body:
Implement user profile page with name, email, phone number editing. Add saved addresses management with CRUD operations, default address setting, and Google Maps address picker integration.

Priority: Medium
Story Points: 0
Status: Completed

tasks.title: [ECOM-063] Profile Auto-Fill and Phone Integration
tasks.body:
Implement auto-fill functionality for checkout contact information using Firebase user profile data. Includes phone number auto-population and order history navigation fix.

Priority: Medium
Story Points: 0
Status: Completed

tasks.title: [ECOM-064] Gmail SMTP Email Notifications
tasks.body:
Implement transactional email system using Gmail SMTP (Nodemailer) for order confirmations, status updates, and delivery notifications. Includes professional HTML email templates and client-safe server-side implementation.

Priority: Medium
Story Points: 0
Status: Completed

tasks.title: [ECOM-065] PayMongo Payment Integration
tasks.body:
Integrate PayMongo for payment processing with support for GCash e-wallet and credit/debit cards. Includes payment link creation, webhook handling for status updates, and order payment status synchronization.

Priority: Medium
Story Points: 0
Status: Completed

tasks.title: [ECOM-066] Wishlist Functionality with Firebase Sync
tasks.body:
Implement wishlist system with localStorage persistence for guests and Firebase sync for authenticated users. Includes wishlist page, add/remove functionality, and "Add All to Cart" batch operation.

Priority: Medium
Story Points: 0
Status: Completed

tasks.title: [ECOM-067] Cart Page and Public Cart Access
tasks.body:
Create dedicated cart page (`/cart`) with full cart management, order summary, and continue shopping functionality. Make cart accessible to guest users without authentication requirement.

Priority: Medium
Story Points: 0
Status: Completed

tasks.title: [ECOM-068] Wishlist Type Compatibility Fix
tasks.body:
Fix TypeScript type compatibility between WishlistContext and TransformedProduct type to prevent type errors when adding products to wishlist from different sources.

Priority: Medium
Story Points: 0
Status: Completed

tasks.title: [ECOM-069] Firebase Email/Password Authentication
tasks.body:
Implement traditional email/password authentication using Firebase Auth, including sign-up, sign-in, email verification, and password reset functionality. Complements existing Google OAuth.

Priority: Medium
Story Points: 0
Status: Completed

tasks.title: [ECOM-070] Passwordless Email Link Authentication
tasks.body:
Implement passwordless authentication using Firebase email link (magic link) sign-in. Users receive a one-time login link via email, providing a more convenient authentication method.

Priority: Medium
Story Points: 0
Status: Completed

tasks.title: [ECOM-071] Firebase User Profile Service with Name Collection
tasks.body:
Create Firebase user profile service to store and manage user data in Firestore (`users/{userId}`). Includes name collection modal for email link users who don't have a display name from OAuth.

Priority: Medium
Story Points: 0
Status: Completed

tasks.title: [ECOM-072] Complete E2E Order Placement Verification
tasks.body:
Comprehensive end-to-end testing of the complete order placement flow from cart to delivery tracking. Verify all integrations (Firebase, PayMongo, Lalamove, Gmail SMTP) work together correctly.

Priority: Medium
Story Points: 0
Status: Completed

epics.title: [ECOM-052] Complete Cart & Checkout System Implementation
epics.body:
Complete Cart & Checkout System Implementation

## Epic Overview

Complete end-to-end buyer-to-seller flow using Firebase Firestore for cart, orders, and user profile persistence, with real-time order management, approval workflow, Lalamove delivery tracking, PayMongo payment integration, and Gmail SMTP email notifications. This epic represents a production-ready e-commerce checkout system with authentication, payment processing, and delivery management.

### Business Objectives

- **Complete Buyer Journey**: Enable customers to add products
